name: HatchLine.HatchLineAttributes
summary: The HatchLineAttributes class is the attributes class of the hatch line.

constructors.name: HatchLine.HatchLineAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default hatch line attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: HatchLine.HatchLineAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new hatch line attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

properties.name: Alignment
properties.summary: Gets or sets the alignment of the hatch line.

properties.name: BehindModelObjects
properties.summary: Gets or sets whether the closed graphic object is drawn behind model objects

properties.name: Hatch
properties.summary: The hatch attributes of the closed graphic object (the closed graphic object is hatchable).

properties.name: Line
properties.summary: The line attributes of the graphic object. A graphic object always consists of lines.

properties.name: Scale
properties.summary: Gets or sets the scale factor for the hatch line.

properties.name: ShowJointLines
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show joint lines of the hatch line.

properties.name: ShowOuterLines
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to show outer lines of the hatch line.

properties.name: Width
properties.summary: Gets or sets the width of the hatch line.
